message:
fix(durability): make sidecar and durable writes atomic, remove unsafe pre-rename delete

Three crash-safety fixes in file_protector.rs:

1. protect_file: write sidecar to .fec.tmp, fsync, then rename to .fec
   so a crash mid-write never leaves a corrupt partial sidecar.

2. write_durable: same temp-fsync-rename pattern to prevent File::create
   truncation from destroying both old and new data on crash.

3. restore_backup: remove unnecessary fs::remove_file before fs::rename.
   POSIX rename() atomically replaces the destination; the explicit
   delete created a window where a crash loses both files.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
